steps.title: Set up the conversion
steps.content: Since $1\text{ rod} = 5.5\text{ yards}$, converting $77$ rods means multiplying by the conversion factor $5.5$.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $423.5$. It's given that $5.5\text{yards}=1\text{rod}$. Therefore, $77$ rods is equivalent to $\left(77\text{rods}\right)\left(\frac{5.5\text{yards}}{1\text{rod}}\right)$, or $423.5$ yards. Note that 423.5 and 847/2 are examples of ways to enter a correct answer.
